name: @hypaware/claude-account
description: Owns the Anthropic credential for attached clients that cannot hold their own (Claude Desktop). Fleet policy picks the credential kind: a static org API key, or a per-user Claude subscription sign-in. Exposes the credential-helper command Desktop's managed 3P-inference profile points at.

commands.name: claude-account credential
commands.summary: Print the resolved Anthropic credential (Desktop helper contract)

commands.name: claude-account login
commands.summary: Sign in with your Claude account (subscription mode)

commands.name: claude-account status
commands.summary: Show credential mode and sign-in state

config_sections.summary: Anthropic credential policy: { mode: 'org_key' | 'subscription', api_key?, api_key_env? }. A central config that names this section locks the mode fleet-wide.
